name: Content Update Request

## Content Update Request

**Page / File affected:**
<!-- Which page or file needs updating? e.g., about.html, events.html, docs/bylaws.md -->

**Section / Element:**
<!-- Which specific section, heading, or element? e.g., Executive Committee section, Upcoming Events card -->

**Current content:**
<!-- Paste or describe the current content that needs to be changed -->

**Proposed new content:**
<!-- Provide the exact text, link, or information that should replace it -->

**Reason for update:**
<!-- Why does this content need to be updated? e.g., officer change, outdated event, broken link -->

**Supporting materials:**
<!-- Any attachments, links, or references that support this request -->

**Urgency:**
- [ ] Urgent (error, outdated critical info)
- [ ] Normal (scheduled update)
- [ ] Low (minor improvement)

**Submitted by:**
<!-- Your name and APSMMB role or membership status -->

---
*This request will be reviewed by the Website & Communications Officer. For urgent issues, email webmaster@apsmmb.org directly.*
